lesson.menu_desc: Who Is Érica? -- Simple Present + verb to be -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 1 -- First Words -- Who Is Érica?
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Érica Maria Machado Santarem | Aula 1 -- First Words

listenings.text: Hello Erica, this is Marina from the Human Resources team at Biodelta. Welcome to the company! I am very happy to have you with us. Your first meeting is on Monday at nine in the morning. The team is friendly and they are excited to meet you. My office is on the third floor, next to the laboratory. If you have any questions, you can call me any time. See you on Monday. Have a great day!

Hi everyone, my name is Carlos. I am a researcher at Biodelta. I am from Rio de Janeiro, but I live in Sao Paulo now. I work in the laboratory every day with a great team. I really like my job because the work is interesting and important. In my free time, I play tennis and I read science books. It is very nice to meet all of you.

extra_audio.text: First, say hello and your name. Second, say where you are from. Third, say where you live. Fourth, say where you work. Fifth, say nice to meet you.
